title: Café Ride with Purpose
description: Social endurance ride with structured blocks

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Zone 2. 43:12 at 75%. Boring? Maybe. Effective? Absolutely.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 75% for 43:12. Where mitochondria multiply and aerobic capacity expands.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% done. 75 minutes left. Not every workout needs to hurt. This is smart training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 75 minutes to go. Your friends are posting threshold intervals. You're being smart. Or lazy. Both?
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% complete. 75 minutes left. Let your mind wander. Stay in zone.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/3. 32:24 at 85%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 36% complete. Rep 2/3. 85% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 85% for 32:24. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/3. 85% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 63% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 43:12 at 75%. This should feel easy. If breathing hard, you're going too hard.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Easy miles = fast racing. 75% for 43:12. Trust the process.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 75% for 43:12. So easy you could do this all day. (Please don't.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay patient. Stay easy. 75% for 43:12. Trust the process.
